title: A2 bridge review: yesterday, today, tomorrow
subtitle: Use past, present, future, reasons, and pronouns together.
duolingoBridge: This final bridge lesson checks readiness for the next A2 block.
overview: Knowledge point 1: combine tenses without panic.
Knowledge point 2: keep each sentence short and meaningful.

items.fr: Hier, je suis allé au centre-ville parce que j’avais besoin d’un livre.
items.en: Yesterday, I went downtown because I needed a book.
items.es: Ayer fui al centro porque necesitaba un libro.

items.fr: Il faisait froid, donc j’ai pris un café.
items.en: It was cold, so I had a coffee.
items.es: Hacía frío, así que tomé un café.

items.fr: Aujourd’hui, je lis le livre et j’en comprends une partie.
items.en: Today, I am reading the book and I understand part of it.
items.es: Hoy leo el libro y entiendo una parte.

items.fr: Demain, je vais en parler avec mon ami.
items.en: Tomorrow, I am going to talk about it with my friend.
items.es: Mañana voy a hablar de ello con mi amigo.

items.fr: Je pense que je progresse parce que je pratique tous les jours.
items.en: I think I am improving because I practice every day.
items.es: Pienso que progreso porque practico todos los días.
